name: 启动同步
summary: POST /api/graph/sync — 启动图谱同步，SSE 流式进度。

specDetail.description: API: POST /api/graph/sync。body: projectPath, storageLocation, syncType。SSE 事件: progress(phase/progress/message), node-generated, complete, error。
parameters: 同步阶段: initializing → scanning → completing

constraints: 同步进行中不允许重复触发
